title: University of Southampton Delhi Latest Press Releases
text:
Read the latest news and important press releases from University of Southampton Delhi, covering research, enterprise, and teaching activities. The most recently published press releases are listed below, with options to search or navigate to older releases. Summaries provide further details and links to relevant external websites.

November 12, 2025: Press Release: University of Southampton Delhi Opens Applications for Postgraduate Programmes Commencing August 2026 ~Expands Postgraduate Portfolio with the Launch of MSc Economics.
October 28, 2025: Press Release: University of Southampton Delhi opens applications for undergraduate admissions 2026 ~ Strengthens STEM Offerings with two new programs - BSc (Hons) Creative Computing and B.Eng. (Hons) Software Engineering.
September 23, 2025: Press Release: University of Southampton Delhi welcomes its first students with a dynamic Induction and Employability Programme. New students enjoyed face-to-face sessions with industry leaders and entrepreneurs as part of their campus welcome.
summary: This section lists recent press releases from the University of Southampton Delhi, announcing postgraduate and undergraduate programme applications for 2026, and the induction of its first student cohort.

title: University of Southampton Delhi News Articles and Initiatives
text:
The University of Southampton Delhi publishes a range of news articles covering its activities, partnerships, and impact on higher education. The most recent articles are listed first, with options to search or navigate through older posts.

November 7, 2025: University of Southampton Delhi and McGraw Hill India unveil second edition of International Relations for Civil Service Aspirants by Shri Ashok Kumar and Dr Rajesh Mohan.
October 9, 2025: University of Southampton joins landmark UK trade delegation in India.
September 11, 2025: Creating a New World Order in Global Education – University of Southampton's launch aims to change higher education dynamics.
July 22, 2025: University of Southampton India campus to offer UK-quality degrees at half the cost, according to VC Professor Mark E Smith.
July 22, 2025: Analysis of who is applying to Southampton’s new India campus, supported by OIEG and India Business Group under UGC.
July 18, 2025: Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan inaugurates the University of Southampton’s first Indian campus in Gurugram.
summary: This section features news articles from the University of Southampton Delhi, detailing partnerships, educational initiatives, global presence, and the inauguration of its India campus.
entities: International Relations for Civil Service Aspirants
